name: @blackbelt-technology/anti-slop-frontend
description_en: Pi skill — a mechanical, countable anti-slop checklist for AI-generated frontend. Catches the specific tells an undirected model defaults to (AI-purple, Inter-everywhere, em-dashes, div-based fake screenshots, eyebrow-per-section, Jane Doe / Acme data). A
description_zh: Pi 技能 — AI 生成前端的机械化、可计数的反懈怠检查清单。捕捉无定向模型默认使用的特定特征（AI 紫色、无处不在的 Inter、破折号、基于 div 的假截图、每部分眉毛、Jane Doe / Acme 数据）。A
